;;;4121       pst_app_splitter_dev->st_video_win[u8WinID].u16_vde_st =

;;;4123               ((u16Y < g_stVideo_HDMITx_Timing[u8Dev][u8Tx].u16_vactive)?(u16Y):(g_stVideo_HDMITx_Timing[u8Dev][u8Tx].u16_vactive));
;;;4124       pst_app_splitter_dev->st_video_win[u8WinID].u16_vde_sp =

;;;4127

;;;4130       {

;;;4132       }
;;;4133   
;;;4134       if((pst_app_splitter_dev->st_video_win[u8WinID].u16_vde_sp-g_stVideo_HDMITx_Timing[u8Dev][u8Tx].u16_voffset)>g_stVideo_HDMITx_Timing[u8Dev][u8Tx].u16_vactive)
;;;4135       {
;;;4136           pst_app_splitter_dev->st_video_win[u8WinID].u16_vde_sp = g_stVideo_HDMITx_Timing[u8Dev][u8Tx].u16_voffset + g_stVideo_HDMITx_Timing[u8Dev][u8Tx].u16_vactive;
